upstream_gate.lineage_note: The Phase 04 fingerprint is historical because selected Prompt 06 repairs followed it. The current source exactly matches the manifest phase_06_repair final fingerprint and explicitly required this independent revalidation. The stale reusable quarantine fingerprint was not reused.

clause_evidence_groups.evidence: Independent current-source reconstruction agrees with the binding table and manifest; revision-local files, routes, identities, codecs, lifecycle hooks, send modes, receive handlers, and bypass risks were inspected.

clause_evidence_groups.clauses: CORE-MODE-*, CORE-INT-*, CORE-SEND-*, CMT-SCOPE-*, CMT-SELECT-*, CMT-INTEGRATION-001..005
clause_evidence_groups.evidence: Default-off configuration, p2p.(*peer).send interception, Broadcast/TryBroadcast expansion, accepted/dialed peer propagation, direct-inbound gate, no-fallback branches, unselected native transport behavior, and changed-package regressions were inspected and exercised.

clause_evidence_groups.clauses: CORE-ERR-*, CORE-REG-*, CORE-WIRE-*, CORE-RECV-*, CMT-ADAPTER-*, CMT-ERROR-*
clause_evidence_groups.evidence: The test-only fake controller exercised registration, exact wire fields, opaque native bytes, IDs, reorder, duplication, malformed/oversized/wrong-destination/unknown-source/unknown-route/type/decode failures, queue pressure, controller failures, native reinjection, and fatal propagation; source branches were checked independently.

Startup order, finite HTTP timeouts, bounded queues/bytes/counters, cancellation, FIFO callback worker, current PeerSet re-resolution, synchronized sink/lifecycle state, partial-start failure, idempotent shutdown, process-visible fatal return, and 20-cycle race tests passed.

Restricted-address configuration and unsafe-network warning exist; exact registration fields exclude secrets; payload/body limits are enforced; the 17-path diff is authorized and manifest-complete; no original test, dependency, schema, persistence, protocol-validity, controller-policy, model, or fuzzing implementation changed.

types: Vote (Prevote, Precommit, and nil BlockID variants)

excluded_message_inventory.family: State Sync light-block and consensus-parameter request/response

controller_scenarios.evidence: Submission is accepted by the fake controller and no native receive occurs without callback.
Proposal, BlockPart, and duplicated Precommit callbacks reach the same native Reactor boundary in callback order and multiplicity with the current authenticated Peer and unchanged ID.

Malformed, oversized, wrong-destination, invalid-source, unknown-route, invalid-adapter, and invalid-native callbacks return non-2xx; a later valid callback is accepted and the service remains healthy.

Post-readiness outage, timeout, non-2xx, callback-listener loss, local invariant, and accepted-work loss become typed fatal errors, stop the node, and reach the command return without direct fallback.
An unselected PEX message uses the original MConnection outbound and inbound paths; disabled selected-route receive and native error behavior remain unchanged.

Every registered selected concrete type round-trips through ordinary wrappers, protobuf bytes, route registry, unwrap, current Peer attribution, and Reactor dispatch; callback 202 is asserted only as reinjection acceptance.

reconstruction_basis: runner baseline's successful Go 1.23.5 RPC control

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import hashlib, json, re, shlex, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('/home/nitro/Desktop/codex-instrumentation'); target=root/'cometbft'
report=json.loads((root/'artifacts/05-validation.json').read_text()); baseline=json.loads((root/'artifacts/baseline-report.json').read_text()); manifest=json.loads((root/'artifacts/instrumentation-manifest.json').read_text()); binding=json.loads((root/'artifacts/01-binding.json').read_text())
ids=set()
for path in [root/'spec/core.md',root/'spec/target-cometbft.md']:
 ids.update(re.findall(r'\*\*([A-Z]+(?:-[A-Z]+)+-\d{3}):\*\*',path.read_text()))
assert set(report['clause_results'])==ids and all(v in {'PASS','FAIL','UNKNOWN','NOT_APPLICABLE'} for v in report['clause_results'].values())
assert report['verification_toolchain']['compatibility_probes'] and all(x['exit_code']==0 for x in report['verification_toolchain']['compatibility_probes'])
fp={'core_sha256':hashlib.sha256((root/'spec/core.md').read_bytes()).hexdigest(),'target_sha256':hashlib.sha256((root/'spec/target-cometbft.md').read_bytes()).hexdigest()}
assert report['specification_hashes']==baseline['spec_fingerprint']==manifest['spec_fingerprint']==fp
head=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','HEAD'],cwd=target,text=True).strip(); assert head==report['source_revision']['commit']==baseline['source_revision']['commit']==manifest['target']['revision']
tracked=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--name-only'],cwd=target,text=True).splitlines(); untracked=sorted(subprocess.check_output(['git','ls-files','--others','--exclude-standard'],cwd=target,text=True).splitlines()); actual={'cometbft/'+p for p in tracked+untracked}
h=hashlib.sha256(); h.update(b'tracked-diff\0'); h.update(subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--binary','--full-index','--no-ext-diff'],cwd=target))
for p in untracked:
 b=(target/p).read_bytes(); h.update(b'untracked\0'); h.update(p.encode()); h.update(b'\0'); h.update(str(len(b)).encode()); h.update(b'\0'); h.update(b)
assert h.hexdigest()==report['target_change_fingerprint']==manifest['final_target_change_fingerprint']==manifest['phase_06_repair']['final_target_change_fingerprint']
assert actual=={x['path'] for x in manifest['changes']} and not any(p.startswith(('spec/','schemas/','validators/','hidden-tests/')) for p in actual)
assert not [p for p in tracked if p.endswith('_test.go')] and not [p for p in actual if p.endswith(('go.mod','go.sum','.proto'))]
labels={x for g in binding['selected_messages'] for x in g['type_labels']}; assert labels=={x for g in manifest['selected_messages'] for x in g['types']}=={x.split(' (')[0] for g in report['selected_message_inventory'] for x in g['types']}
q=baseline['quarantine_policies'][0]; known=next(x for x in baseline['known_failures'] if x['id']=='BASE-CONSENSUS-001'); commands={x['id']:x for x in report['commands']}
assert q['remaining_suite_command']==commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-REMAINING']['command']=="go test ./internal/consensus -skip '^TestStateFullRound1$' -count=1 -timeout=10m"
assert q['isolated_observation_command']==commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-ISOLATED']['command'] and commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-ISOLATED']['exit_code']==known['expected_exit_code']==1 and commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-ISOLATED']['result']=='KNOWN_BASELINE_FAILURE' and commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-ISOLATED']['additional_failures'] is False
assert commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-REMAINING']['exit_code']==0 and commands['CMD-CONSENSUS-REMAINING']['baseline_disposition']=='NONE' and commands['CMD-TEST-DISCOVERY']['exit_code']==0
assert report['validated_baseline']['quarantine']['original_test_sha256']=='c15b941a7b8b2def1e380e615716239ae29ab19b8925703224dc0979f86cfb13'==hashlib.sha256((target/'internal/consensus/state_test.go').read_bytes()).hexdigest()
assert report['validated_baseline']['quarantine']['all_required_signature_substrings_matched'] is True and report['validated_baseline']['quarantine']['additional_failures'] is False
assert commands['CMD-RPC-NORMALIZED']['exit_code']==0 and report['validated_baseline']['rpc']['normalized_rerun_passed'] is True
for x in report['environment_preparation']+report['commands']:
 assert isinstance(x['command'],str) and x['command'].strip(); assert not any(token in x['command'] for token in ['<place'+'holder>','[command'+' omitted]'])
 if not x['command'].startswith("python3 - <<'PY'"): shlex.split(x['command'])
for v in report['violations']:
 assert isinstance(v.get('repairable'),bool)
 if v['repairable']:
  h=v.get('repair_handoff',{}); assert all(h.get(k) for k in ['allowed_read_paths','allowed_write_paths','focused_commands','protected_paths','constraints'])
 else:
  assert v.get('non_repairable_reason') and not v.get('repair_handoff',{}).get('allowed_write_paths')
assert (report['status']=='PASS')==(report['downstream_allowed'] is True)
if report['status']=='PASS':
 assert all(v=='PASS' for v in report['clause_results'].values()) and not report['violations'] and not report['unexplained_test_failures'] and report['manifest_findings']['status']=='PASS' and report['forbidden_change_findings']['status']=='PASS' and report['revalidation_required'] is False
print(f"PASS: audited {len(ids)} clauses, {len(actual)} manifested target paths, exact quarantine separation, toolchain probes, command syntax, and Prompt 06 repair-handoff semantics")
PY
